message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 247 migrate 10 get_saved_search_by_name sites via shared cx scope (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

High-density batch migration. 10 `storage.get_saved_search_by_name(&name)`
call sites across SavedSearchCommands::{Run,Schedule,Unschedule,
Enable,Disable,Delete} and nested branches all now route through
`get_saved_search_by_name_with_cx(&storage_cx, &name)`.

Technique: introduced a SINGLE `storage_cx` binding at the top of
the `Some(SearchCommands::Saved { command }) =>` arm (shared across
all SavedSearchCommands sub-match arms), then used `replace_all=true`
to swap all 10 call sites in one edit.

- Opened outer arm with `=> { ... match command { ... } }` structure
  (previously `=> match command { ... }`) so the cx binding is in
  scope for every sub-arm.
- `replace_all` migrated all 10 calls bit-for-bit.
- Closing brace fixed up to balance the new block.

This is a more efficient pattern than per-site cx declarations —
applicable anywhere a common outer scope encloses multiple cx-first
call sites.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Cumulative main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 247: 112 sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
